children.text: Start potty time with the message, You can do it, just stick to it! (1:07)
Celebrate growing, changing, and trying new things. Unlocks after 16 stickers. (3:30)
Help your child learn to listen to what his amazing body can tell him. (4:28)
Sing, sign and dance your way through the four steps of the potty time routine. (3:36)
Use this catchy song to help your child remember to wash her hands. (2:24)
Remind your child that sometimes you have to stop - and go, go, go! (2:39)
Help your child feel better after an accident. (3:15)
